# setLanguage(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sets the language of the text to be tokenized.

## Declaration

```swift
func setLanguage(_ language: NLLanguage)
```

## Configuring a tokenizer

- **string**: The text to be tokenized.
- **unit**: The linguistic unit that this tokenizer uses.
- **NLTokenizer.Attributes**: Hints about the contents of the string for the tokenizer.

items.description: The linguistic unit that this tokenizer uses.
